mapper.insert: insert into study_user_like ( user_id, type, target_id, create_time ) values ( #{userId}, #{type}, #{targetId}, #{createTime} )
mapper.delete: delete from study_user_like where user_id = #{userId} and type = #{type} and target_id = #{targetId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from study_user_like where user_id = #{userId} and type = #{type} and target_id = #{targetId}

SELECT l.like_id as id, l.user_id as userId, l.target_id as targetId, l.type, CASE WHEN l.type = '1' THEN les.title WHEN l.type = '2' THEN a.title ELSE '' END as title, l.create_time as createTime, CASE WHEN l.type = '2' THEN SUBSTRING(a.content, 1, 150) ELSE '' END as contentSummary, CASE WHEN l.type = '1' THEN SUBSTRING(les.description, 1, 150) ELSE '' END as descriptionSummary FROM study_user_like l LEFT JOIN study_lesson les ON l.type = '1' AND l.target_id = les.lesson_id LEFT JOIN study_article a ON l.type = '2' AND l.target_id = a.article_id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY l.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
